qa_pair.question: The Opportunity Party publishes detailed policy documents converted from official PDFs. One of their tax policies has two such documents: a "Policy Overview" and one other. What is the document_type of that second tax document?
Among the Opportunity Party's detailed policy documents, what month and year is the Tax Reset Policy Overview dated?
Among the Opportunity Party's detailed policy documents, which policy's Policy Overview is dated June 2025? Give the policy name.
The Opportunity Party has a detailed policy document about energy dated February 2026. What is the name of that policy?
Searching the Opportunity Party content for "capital gains" returns a top-ranked policy. What is the slug of that policy?
The Opportunity Party published a news statement about the situation in a specific territory in the Middle East. Which territory (one word)?
How many party-information sections (about / governance) does the Opportunity Party MCP server expose?
How many detailed policy documents (PDF-derived, excluding placeholder/unknown rows) are available through the Opportunity Party MCP server?
The Opportunity Party news section includes a submission about a budget statement for a particular year. What year is named in that budget policy statement submission?
Among the Opportunity Party's detailed policy documents, which marine/ocean policy has a Policy Overview dated February 2026? Give the policy name.
